examples: Fields of flowers, tile roofed villages and tasty meals enrich this wonderful experience.

The shopping centre is not roofed over.
It winds through hills and valleys, past Palestinian villages and nearby red-roofed Jewish settlements.
The tall and wide buildings still look distinctly Victorian from the exterior, with light-coloured brick and red-roofed spires.
